mnemonics: BIG KARTS: Basic logic Gates, Implement functions, Karnaugh maps, Adders/ALUs, ROMs/PLDs, Timing hazards, Seven-segment decoders
keyPoints: Combinational logic outputs depend ONLY on current inputs (no memory)
Boolean algebra and Karnaugh maps are used to simplify logic expressions
Common combinational circuits include multiplexers, decoders, and adders
commonMistakes: Forgetting to consider propagation delays leading to timing hazards (glitches)
Incorrectly grouping cells in a Karnaugh map, violating adjacency rules
Confusing decoder and encoder functions (decoders select one output, encoders prioritize inputs)
